sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports pain in the left shoulder. The patient reports pain in the left hand. The patient reports a headache. The patient reports pain. The patient reports pain in the right shoulder.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is mildly low. Heart rate is within normal limits. Neurologic examination is nonfocal.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient is experiencing pain. The patient sustained a shoulder injury. The patient needs to have this fracture healed.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor recommends avoiding tackle football. The doctor suggests flag football in the future. Start tylenol for the pain. Order follow-up in one week.
